channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Variations on a Meal - Revaried
item.description: Adds more ingredient options to cooking for vanilla meals and pies. Forked for 1.22.

item.title: Notice Board
item.description: Notice board where you can post and read player notices. Focused on RP aspect.

item.title: De-Craftable Raw Bricks
item.description: Adds recipes to turn raw bricks back into clay.

item.title: Ambien's Racial Traits
item.description: Ambien's Racial Traits adds racial bonus to characters added from racial equality, skeletons, others

item.title: Vintage Canvas
item.description: Craft canvases, mix paint, and use brushes to decorate your world!

item.title: Astria Porta
item.description: Astria Porta brings SG-1's stargates to Vintage Story for you to explore the world

item.title: Plaster Stairs & Slabs
item.description: A simple mod for adding plaster stairs and slabs.

item.title: CFY Simple Hotbar Refill
item.description: Automatically refills tools, blocks, and items in the hotbar.

item.title: BetterChinese
item.description: 更好的汉化

item.title: Fast Ground Placing
item.description: Increases the bulk stack quantity on a few base game resources.

item.title: Waterfall: SomeLiquidSourceTransport
item.description: Water must be manually spread from naturally generated liquid bodies.

item.title: Ore Balance: Amount Tweaker
item.description: Tweaks Ore Chunks and Crystalized Chunks to be giving less Nuggets per Crafting Operation. Config.

item.title: Better Rift Ward
item.description: The Rift Ward - but better. Based on Better Jonas Devices mod

item.title: TassHunting
item.description: Arrows Stick - Blood - Smarter Animal AI - Aiming Tweaks - Health Based Animal Speed

item.title: Animalica - Body Tools & Classes
item.description: Wearable body tools and universal classes for Animalica player species.

item.title: Riley's Classes
item.description: Addon for Aldi's Classes, makes classes interact with other mods and adds new ones!

item.title: RKN Generic Crafting
item.description: Generic crafting system that completely replaces the UI grid with a more immersive mechanic

item.title: CompostTweak
item.description: Makes composting alot more interactive and adds more things to compost.

item.title: Rivers Extended
item.description: Rivers Extended adds configurable worldgen tuning for the Rivers mod.

item.title: C&N Market
item.description: I just need a mod with currency, trade blocks and without d...

item.title: Wild Farming Fork
item.description: Cultivate flowers, herbs, mushrooms, trees, and shrubs. And much more.

item.title: TSearch
item.description: Press T on any item in your inventory or handbook to highlight nearby containers holding it.

item.title: C&N Events
item.description: Arena PvP events for Vintage Story: 1v1 duels, FFA, and Spleef...

item.title: Figurines
item.description: This mod adds Figurines

item.title: The Crown & The Coalition Server Tweaks
item.description: Server tweaks for The Crown & The Coalition.

item.title: Primitive Survival
item.description: Fishing, trapping, irrigation, smoker, nightcrawlers, snakes, and much more!

item.title: Portcullis, Drawbridges and stuff
item.description: Adds Portcullis, Drawbridges, Brazier and a working lever to add some RP to your builds.

item.title: Glowest Worms
item.description: Glowest Worms is an expansion of glow worms and many surrounding mechanics.

item.title: Ambien's Rust Teleporter
item.description: Little teleporter mod i made for a server

item.title: Storage Tweaks
item.description: Adds compact/sort and quick-unload buttons to chests and inventory.
